posts.author: shoffmeier (Stephanie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Want the ability to see pinned views on the Monday CRM mobile app.

What are you trying to achieve

Our sales reps are in the field all day long- the mobile app is primarily what they use. The mobile app view is either too simple (list view) or way to complex (Main Table view)- I know they can navigate to the pinned views that mimic the board. but it needs to be a better mobile app interface that I can choose only some fields and rearrange them rather than having to exactly mirror the desktop app.
